CREATE TABLE trace_log (address UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT arrayStringConcat(arrayMap(addr -> addressToLine(addr), arrayJoin([94784076370703, 94784076370706])), '\n') AS lines FROM trace_log;
WITH (SELECT arrayMap(x -> addressToLine(x), [94784076370703, 94784076370704]) AS lines) SELECT arrayStringConcat(lines, '\n');
SELECT addressToLine(94784076370703) AS code_line, addressToLine(94784076370704) AS next_code_line FROM trace_log;
CREATE TABLE debug_info (address UInt64, debug_info String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO debug_info VALUES (94784076370703, 'Valid Debug Info'), (94784076370706, 'Another Debug Info');
SELECT d.debug_info, addressToLine(t.address) FROM trace_log t LEFT JOIN debug_info d ON t.address = d.address;
SELECT addressToLine(12345678901234) AS trace_info FROM system.trace_log WHERE address = 94784076370703;
